title: ElderShield
text:
ElderShield - SupportGoWhere
ElderShield
Share link
Provides basic financial support to Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents with severe disability, especially during old age and need long-term care.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive up to $400 per month for up to 6 years
Apply through AIC's eService Portal (eFASS)
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Monthly cash payouts of $300 or $400 for up to 5 or 6 years upon severe disability, depending on the plan.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents who are ElderShield policyholders.

Assessed by an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor to be unable to perform 3 out of the following 6 Activities of Daily Living (ADLs):

Washing

Dressing

Feeding

Toileting

Walking or moving around

Transferring

How to apply?

Note: Applications for enrolment into ElderShield as a new policyholder have closed.

To submit a claim, you will have to:

contact an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor for a severe disability assessment. See list of assessors.

log in to AIC’s eService portal (eFASS) with your Singpass to submit a claim application.

Where can I find help?

View more details

AIC hotline: 1800 650 6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
